dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {{firstname}}. Here are your clubs.

empty.title: No clubs found
empty.description: Start by creating a new club.

admin.title: Admin Area
admin.description: Manage applications and users across the entire portal.
admin.approve_membership_desc: Confirm the entry date. If the person has provided payment details, please review them beforehand.
admin.deny_membership_desc: Do you really want to deny this request?
admin.cancel_membership_desc: Please select the cancellation date (end of active period).

audit_page.title: Activity Log
audit_page.description: Recent administrative changes in the system
audit_page.author: Author...
audit_page.no_actions: No actions have been logged yet.
audit_page.unauthorized: You do not have permission to view this page.

membership.apply_description: Please specify when the membership should start (optional):
membership.cancel_description: Please specify when the membership should end (optional):
membership.consent_accuracy: I confirm that my information is truthful.
membership.consent_statutes: I have read and accept the <1>statutes</1>.
membership.consent_finances: I have read and accept the <1>contribution regulations</1>.

census.title: Census Report
census.description: Annual membership census report from clubs to the association.
census.confirm_overwrite: A census report for the year {{year}} already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

messages.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this club?
messages.remove_owner_confirm: Really remove this user as manager?
messages.needs_authorized_rep: At least one board member must be authorized to represent the club according to §26 BGB.

active_members.title: Active Members Review
active_members.description: Cross-reference census data with portal registrations.
active_members.click_to_load: Click Refresh to load the active members review.

card.title: Club Data
card.description: Enter the basic data of your club.

search.title: Similar Clubs
search.description: To avoid duplicates, please check if your club already exists:
search.found_matches: We found the following similar clubs:

errors.create_failed: Creation failed. Please check your inputs.

messages.your_club_is_member: Your club {{name}} is already a member of DPV. You can cancel your individual membership if you wish.

login.title: Login
login.error_generic: Login failed. Please check your inputs.

register.title: Register
register.description: Create a new account with DPV.
register.password_hint: At least 10 characters and 8 different character types.

success.title: Registration successful!
success.description: Your account has been created. You can now log in immediately with your email address. We have sent you a confirmation email.

register.error_generic: Registration failed. Please try again later.
register.question: No account yet?

request.title: Forgot Password
request.description: Enter your email address to receive a link to reset your password.

success.title: Email sent
success.description: If an account with this email exists, we have sent you a link to reset your password.

success.title: Password changed
success.description: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now login.

not_found.title: Page not found (404)
not_found.message: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

create_club.question: How do I register a club?
create_club.answer: To register a new club with the DPV, you must be registered and logged in. Click on "Register a Club" in the dashboard and fill out the form. Your application will then be reviewed by an administrator.

after_registration.question: What happens after registration?
after_registration.answer: After registration, you will receive an email to confirm your address. You can then log in and manage or register clubs.

reset_password.question: How can I change my password?
reset_password.answer: If you have forgotten your password, use the "Forgot Password" function on the login page. You will then receive a link to reset it.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content1: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 Para. 1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
disclaimer.content2: Obligations to remove or block the use of information in accordance with general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a concrete infringement. Upon becoming aware of such infringements, we will remove this content immediately.

landing.welcome: Welcome to the club portal of the German Parkour Association. Here you can apply for your personal membership in the association, create clubs and companies and manage their memberships.
landing.what_do_you_want_to_do: What do you want to do?

active_membership.title: Active Membership
active_membership.description: Do you want to become a member of the Parkour Association as a private person? Then manage your membership in your personal profile.

ordinary_membership.title: Ordinary Membership
ordinary_membership.description: If you represent a club as a board member and want to become a member of the German Parkour Association or Regional Parkour Association with it, then manage your memberships via the club administration.

supporting_membership.title: Supporting Membership
supporting_membership.description: Do you want to support the association financially? Then become a supporting member and decide for yourself how much contribution you want to pay.

extraordinary_membership.title: Extraordinary Membership
extraordinary_membership.description: If you represent a company operating in the field of parkour and want to become a member of the German Parkour Association with it, then manage your membership via the company administration.
